scores.metric: sandbox --disable all (masked) = 2 (now SCORABLE in a private worktree build; the prior 'sandbox unmeasurable' sibling-label-collision did NOT reproduce here). The 2 diffs are the loop-top hoist of `addiu a0,sp,24`. Full-build SHA1 is the real gate.

sessions.lever: blocked-lane triage — 3 more rules-removed full-build loop variants, all DIFF

reviewer.evidence: No improving candidate — candidate.c is HEAD's loop region (matches only with the 3 rules). No new cheat introduced.

remaining_gap.summary: 2-insn loop scheduling plateau. Target hoists `addiu a0,sp,24` (= &s.sp18, the func_8007352C call arg, loop-invariant) to the LOOP TOP at 0x80069c5c — it is the bnez branch target. GCC's list scheduler instead emits the address computation late (right before the jal). The 3 regfix rules physically reorder the 3-insn window (94,92,93), insert a stable loop-top label, and retarget the bnez to it.
remaining_gap.rules_required_for_full_match: func_80069AE4 in regfix.txt: `reorder 94,92,93 @92-94`, `insert_label .L_LOOP_TOP: @93`, `subst .L\d+ .L_LOOP_TOP @104`. All 3 must go for COMPLETED-C. No pure-C source found that schedules the invariant `addiu a0,sp,24` to the loop head.

next_hypotheses: INSTRUMENTED .sched DUMP (named next step): build tmp/gccdbg/cc1 with BB2_SCHED_DEBUG (register-alloc-deep-dive.md recipe) on an isolated standalone, dump the loop's scheduling DAG, and learn why GCC places the loop-invariant `addiu a0,sp,24` last in its 3-insn ready window instead of at the block head. The target's placement = the address is the branch target (computed once at loop top, live across the body).

Loop-invariant hoist: GCC 2.7.2 loop.c MIGHT hoist `&s.sp18` if it sees it as a loop-invariant giv/biv-independent expression. Try forms that present the address as a pure loop-invariant the loop optimizer pulls to the preheader/header (e.g. a `volatile`-free invariant that survives to the header). Caution: the address must remain RE-materialized at the header (target recomputes `addiu a0,sp,24` each iteration as the branch target), not spilled to a callee-save.
Directed permuter from this structural seed (random masked-loop-scheduling search needs the seed) — PERM_* on the loop body only.
